title: Decadent Spring Australian Beans Bowl
description: Savor the essence of Spring in this rich and savory Australian-inspired Beans Bowl, featuring tender beans, umami dashi extract, and a hint of lemon.
instructions: In a large saucepan, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and sauté for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the sliced red onion and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until translucent.
Add the cannellini beans, miso paste, and dashi powder to the saucepan.
Stir well to combine, then add the lemon juice and toss to coat.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally.
In a separate pan, heat a tablespoon of olive oil over medium heat.
Add the shredded kale and cook for 2-3 minutes, until wilted.
Season the kale with salt and black pepper to taste.
To assemble the bowls, divide the bean mixture between four bowls.
Top each bowl with a spoonful of wilted kale.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley, if desired.
Sprinkle with coconut flakes, if using.
